paper_title: AGRO-ECOLOGICAL DYNAMICS IN THE COASTAL AREAS OF THE VIETNAMESE MEKONG DELTA IN THE CONTEXT OF CLIMATE CHANGE: A CASE STUDY IN BAC LIEU PROVINCE

entities.description: The interaction between physical properties and anthropological impacts leading to land use changes.
Environmental changes affecting surface water resources and livelihood in coastal areas.
An environmental threat leading to saline intrusion in the coastal plains.
The movement of saline water into freshwater areas, a key driver of land use change.
An approach used to collect primary data from local governmental staffs and farmers.
A method used to collect primary data from local farmers regarding farming systems.
Used to generate results for predicting changes in agro-ecological zones.
Improved farming technologies that eased the pressure on labor.
Secondary numerical data used in combination with sea level rise scenarios.
Data collected from various governmental offices in the 7 districts of Bac Lieu.
Specific scenario value used for predicting agro-ecological changes.
The total number of households interviewed in the study area.
The research field focusing on environmental dynamics and climate impacts.
